novel.span: The apartments are spacious, well-equipped, have luxurious interiors, and particularly feature beautiful sea-view balconies.

items.span: The hotel has an ideal location, just a few steps from the beach and close to famous attractions.
The apartments are spacious, modern, and fully equipped with a comfortable space and a balcony overlooking the sea.
The service here is very good, with friendly and enthusiastic staff.
Amenities such as the pool, gym, and restaurant are all of high quality.
If you are looking for a relaxing, luxurious, and convenient place, FLC Sea Tower is the perfect choice!
If you are looking for a relaxing, luxurious, and convenient place, FLC Sea Tower is the perfect choice!
modern
The apartment has a beautiful location, right near the beach and with an impressive sea view.
The living space in the apartment is very spacious, airy, and modern, with all the amenities such as air conditioning, TV, refrigerator, and washing machine, making me feel like I'm at home.
The facilities here are also very impressive, especially the infinity pool on the rooftop, where I could relax and enjoy the sea view.
The service at FLC Sea Tower is very professional and attentive.
I was particularly impressed with the cleanliness and tidiness of the entire premises.
modern
